items.name: Executive Summary
items.tagline: Condense any document into a structured executive brief
items.description: Transforms long documents into concise executive summaries with key findings and recommendations.

items.name: Meeting Notes Distiller
items.tagline: Turn meeting transcripts into structured notes and action items
items.description: Converts raw meeting transcripts into organized notes with decisions, action items, and follow-ups.

items.name: Article Key Points
items.tagline: Extract essential insights from any article
items.description: Reads through articles and surfaces the most important takeaways in a scannable format.

items.name: Podcast / Video Summary
items.tagline: Summarize spoken-word content into structured notes
items.description: Turns podcast transcripts or video captions into a clean summary with timestamps and highlights.

items.name: Legal Document Summary
items.tagline: Translate dense legal text into plain English
items.description: Summarizes contracts, agreements, and legal filings in plain language for non-lawyers.

items.name: Financial Report Summary
items.tagline: Distill earnings reports and financial statements
items.description: Extracts the key numbers, trends, and signals from financial reports into a concise brief.

items.name: Code Reviewer
items.tagline: Thorough code review covering quality, security, and performance
items.description: Performs a structured code review across correctness, security, performance, readability, and best practices.

items.name: Code Explainer
items.tagline: Explain code in plain English for any audience
items.description: Translates technical code into clear, jargon-free explanations.

items.name: Unit Test Generator
items.tagline: Generate comprehensive unit tests for any function
items.description: Creates thorough unit tests covering happy paths, edge cases, and error conditions.

items.name: Bug Report Analyzer
items.tagline: Diagnose bug reports and generate investigation plans
items.description: Analyzes bug reports and stack traces to produce structured investigation plans with fix suggestions.

items.name: Refactoring Advisor
items.tagline: Identify and prioritize refactoring opportunities
items.description: Analyzes code for refactoring opportunities and produces a prioritized improvement plan.

items.name: API Documentation Generator
items.tagline: Generate OpenAPI-style docs from code or spec
items.description: Produces structured API documentation with endpoints, parameters, request/response examples.

items.name: SQL Query Optimizer
items.tagline: Optimize slow SQL queries for performance
items.description: Analyzes SQL queries for performance issues and rewrites them with indexing and optimization suggestions.

items.name: Security Vulnerability Scanner
items.tagline: Scan code for OWASP Top 10 and common vulnerabilities
items.description: Reviews code for security vulnerabilities including injection, auth issues, and data exposure risks.

items.name: Code Migration Guide
items.tagline: Plan and execute framework or language migrations
items.description: Creates a step-by-step migration plan from one technology to another with risk assessment.

items.name: SWOT Analysis
items.tagline: Structured strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats
items.description: Generates a complete SWOT analysis with strategic recommendations.

items.name: Sentiment Analyzer
items.tagline: Classify sentiment and emotional tone of any text
items.description: Analyzes text for overall sentiment, emotional tones, and key phrases driving the score.

items.name: Root Cause Analysis
items.tagline: Identify root causes using the 5 Whys methodology
items.description: Guides a structured 5 Whys root cause analysis for incidents or business problems.

items.name: User Feedback Classifier
items.tagline: Categorize and extract themes from user feedback
items.description: Processes raw user feedback into structured categories, themes, and actionable insights.

items.name: Risk Assessment Matrix
items.tagline: Identify, score, and prioritize project risks
items.description: Produces a structured risk register with likelihood, impact, and mitigation strategies.

items.name: Gap Analysis
items.tagline: Identify the distance between current and desired state
items.description: Maps the gap between where you are and where you want to be, with a roadmap to close it.

items.name: Professional Email
items.tagline: Draft polished, purpose-driven business emails
items.description: Creates professional emails with clear subject lines and appropriate tone.

items.name: Product Description
items.tagline: Benefit-focused e-commerce copy that converts
items.description: Writes compelling product descriptions with headlines, bullet points, and SEO keywords.

items.name: Technical Documentation
items.tagline: Clear, structured docs for any component or API
items.description: Produces complete technical documentation with overview, usage, parameters, and troubleshooting.

items.name: Press Release Writer
items.tagline: Craft newsworthy press releases in AP style
items.description: Writes professional press releases following AP style with quotes, boilerplate, and contact info.

items.name: Job Description Writer
items.tagline: Write inclusive, compelling job postings
items.description: Creates clear, inclusive job descriptions that attract top talent and set accurate expectations.

items.name: Blog Post Outline
items.tagline: Create structured outlines for long-form content
items.description: Generates a detailed blog post outline with headings, subpoints, and SEO optimization notes.

items.name: Case Study Writer
items.tagline: Write compelling customer success stories
items.description: Structures customer wins into persuasive case studies following the challenge-solution-result framework.

items.name: FAQ Generator
items.tagline: Generate comprehensive FAQ sections from any content
items.description: Creates thorough FAQ sections anticipating real user questions from a topic or document.

items.name: Support Ticket Classifier
items.tagline: Triage and categorize incoming support tickets
items.description: Classifies tickets by category, priority, and sentiment and extracts key diagnostic info.

items.name: Support Response Generator
items.tagline: Draft empathetic, solution-oriented customer replies
items.description: Creates helpful, empathetic customer support responses with clear next steps.

items.name: Escalation Detector
items.tagline: Identify tickets that need immediate escalation
items.description: Scans messages for escalation signals like legal threats, VIP accounts, or critical issues.

items.name: Churn Risk Analyzer
items.tagline: Detect early signals of customer churn
items.description: Analyzes customer communication and behavior signals to predict and prevent churn.

items.name: Knowledge Base Article
items.tagline: Write self-service help articles from support tickets
items.description: Transforms resolved support tickets or feature explanations into polished KB articles.

items.name: NPS Response Analyzer
items.tagline: Extract insights from Net Promoter Score responses
items.description: Analyzes NPS survey responses to surface themes, segment detractors/promoters, and recommend actions.

items.name: Entity Extractor
items.tagline: Pull names, dates, locations, and amounts from any text
items.description: Identifies and categorizes all named entities in unstructured text in structured format.

items.name: Structured Data Parser
items.tagline: Convert unstructured text to JSON using a schema
items.description: Parses free-form text and maps it to a defined JSON schema with confidence scoring.

items.name: Invoice & Receipt Extractor
items.tagline: Extract structured data from invoices and receipts
items.description: Pulls vendor, line items, totals, and payment terms from invoice text or OCR output.

items.name: Contract Key Terms Extractor
items.tagline: Pull critical clauses and obligations from contracts
items.description: Extracts parties, obligations, dates, payment terms, and risk clauses from contract text.

items.name: Resume / CV Parser
items.tagline: Extract structured data from resumes and CVs
items.description: Parses resume text into structured JSON with contact info, experience, skills, and education.

items.name: Survey Response Analyzer
items.tagline: Extract themes and insights from survey open-ends
items.description: Processes open-ended survey responses to identify patterns, themes, and sentiment.

items.name: Comparative Analysis
items.tagline: Systematically compare options and produce a recommendation
items.description: Evaluates multiple options against defined criteria and produces a comparison matrix with a final recommendation.

items.name: Research Paper Summary
items.tagline: Distill academic or technical papers into actionable insights
items.description: Summarizes research papers with methodology, findings, practical implications, and limitations.

items.name: Market Research Report
items.tagline: Synthesize market data into a structured research report
items.description: Compiles market size, trends, players, and opportunities into a structured research brief.

items.name: Competitor Analysis
items.tagline: Deep-dive competitive intelligence on a specific rival
items.description: Researches and structures competitive intelligence on a specific company or product.

items.name: Technology Trend Report
items.tagline: Analyze and forecast trends in a technology domain
items.description: Structures an analysis of emerging technology trends with adoption curves and strategic implications.

items.name: SEO Meta Tags Generator
items.tagline: Generate optimized title tags and meta descriptions
items.description: Creates SEO-optimized title tags, meta descriptions, and Open Graph tags for web pages.

items.name: Ad Copy Writer
items.tagline: Write high-converting ad copy for any platform
items.description: Creates multiple ad copy variants for Google, Meta, LinkedIn, and display ads.

items.name: Email Newsletter Writer
items.tagline: Craft engaging newsletters that drive opens and clicks
items.description: Writes full email newsletters with subject lines, preheader, body, and CTAs optimized for engagement.

items.name: Landing Page Copy
items.tagline: Conversion-optimized copy for landing pages
items.description: Writes full landing page copy following the AIDA framework with social proof and objection handling.

items.name: Content Brief Generator
items.tagline: Create detailed briefs for content writers
items.description: Generates comprehensive content briefs with SEO requirements, structure, and messaging guidelines.

items.name: Resume Screener
items.tagline: Score and rank candidates against job requirements
items.description: Evaluates resumes against job criteria and produces a structured scorecard with hire/no-hire recommendation.

items.name: Interview Question Generator
items.tagline: Create targeted interview questions for any role
items.description: Generates behavioral, technical, and situational interview questions tailored to a specific role.

items.name: Performance Review Writer
items.tagline: Draft balanced, constructive performance reviews
items.description: Writes structured performance reviews with achievements, areas for growth, and development goals.

items.name: Employee Onboarding Plan
items.tagline: Create structured 30-60-90 day onboarding plans
items.description: Generates detailed onboarding plans with milestones, activities, and success metrics.

items.name: Job Offer Letter
items.tagline: Generate professional, legally-aware offer letters
items.description: Drafts complete job offer letters with compensation details, start date, and standard contingencies.

items.name: Financial Statement Analyzer
items.tagline: Analyze P&L, balance sheets, and cash flow statements
items.description: Reviews financial statements to surface trends, ratios, and red flags for business health.

items.name: Budget Variance Explainer
items.tagline: Explain budget vs actual variances in business terms
items.description: Analyzes budget variances and explains them with root causes and corrective actions.

items.name: Investment Thesis Writer
items.tagline: Structure an investment thesis for any asset or company
items.description: Creates a structured investment thesis with bull/bear cases, valuation, and risk factors.

items.name: Expense Categorizer
items.tagline: Auto-categorize expense line items for accounting
items.description: Categorizes raw expense data into standard accounting categories with tax treatment notes.

items.name: Cash Flow Forecast
items.tagline: Project cash flow based on historical data and assumptions
items.description: Builds a structured cash flow forecast with scenario analysis for planning purposes.

items.name: Contract Review Checklist
items.tagline: Review contracts for missing or risky clauses
items.description: Evaluates contracts against a standard checklist of clauses, flagging gaps and risks.

items.name: Privacy Policy Analyzer
items.tagline: Check privacy policies for GDPR and CCPA compliance
items.description: Reviews privacy policies against GDPR, CCPA, and general best practices, flagging gaps and risks.

items.name: Terms of Service Summarizer
items.tagline: Translate lengthy ToS into plain English bullet points
items.description: Extracts the key user rights, restrictions, and risky clauses from Terms of Service documents.

items.name: Legal Memo Writer
items.tagline: Structure legal analysis in standard memo format
items.description: Drafts legal memos with question presented, brief answer, facts, analysis, and conclusion.

items.name: Lesson Plan Creator
items.tagline: Design structured lesson plans with objectives and activities
items.description: Creates detailed lesson plans with learning objectives, activities, assessment, and materials.

items.name: Quiz Generator
items.tagline: Create quizzes with multiple formats from any content
items.description: Generates multiple choice, true/false, and short answer questions from educational content.

items.name: Learning Objective Writer
items.tagline: Write SMART learning objectives using Bloom's taxonomy
items.description: Creates measurable learning objectives at all levels of Bloom's taxonomy for courses and modules.

items.name: Concept Explainer for Beginners
items.tagline: Explain any complex concept to a complete beginner
items.description: Breaks down complex concepts using the Feynman Technique with analogies and examples.

items.name: Course Outline Generator
items.tagline: Structure a full course curriculum from a topic
items.description: Creates a complete course outline with modules, lessons, learning objectives, and assessments.

items.name: Social Media Post Generator
items.tagline: Create platform-native posts for any social network
items.description: Generates optimized posts for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, and Facebook with platform-specific formatting.

items.name: Hashtag Strategy
items.tagline: Research and tier hashtags for maximum reach
items.description: Develops a tiered hashtag strategy with high, medium, and niche tags for content amplification.

items.name: Content Calendar Planner
items.tagline: Plan a month of social content around themes and events
items.description: Creates a structured content calendar with themes, post types, and copy ideas for a full month.

items.name: Community Response Writer
items.tagline: Craft authentic replies to comments and DMs
items.description: Generates on-brand, authentic responses to social media comments, DMs, and reviews.

items.name: Influencer Brief
items.tagline: Create detailed briefs for influencer partnerships
items.description: Produces comprehensive influencer briefs with campaign goals, content requirements, and dos and don'ts.

items.name: User Story Writer
items.tagline: Write well-structured user stories with acceptance criteria
items.description: Creates user stories in standard format with acceptance criteria, edge cases, and story points guidance.

items.name: Feature Specification
items.tagline: Write detailed product specs for engineering teams
items.description: Creates comprehensive feature specifications with requirements, flows, edge cases, and success metrics.

items.name: Roadmap Prioritizer
items.tagline: Score and rank features using RICE or MoSCoW
items.description: Evaluates a list of features using prioritization frameworks to produce a ranked roadmap.

items.name: Stakeholder Update
items.tagline: Write concise product updates for leadership
items.description: Produces clear stakeholder updates with progress, blockers, decisions needed, and next steps.

items.name: Product Requirements Document
items.tagline: Create a full PRD for a new product or feature
items.description: Produces a complete Product Requirements Document with context, user needs, requirements, and success criteria.

items.name: Cold Outreach Email
items.tagline: Write personalized cold emails that get replies
items.description: Creates compelling, personalized cold outreach emails with high-converting subject lines and CTAs.

items.name: Objection Handler
items.tagline: Craft responses to common sales objections
items.description: Prepares polished, empathetic responses to the most common objections in your sales cycle.

items.name: Sales Proposal Writer
items.tagline: Create compelling, customized sales proposals
items.description: Writes professional sales proposals with problem framing, solution, pricing, and social proof.

items.name: Follow-Up Email Sequence
items.tagline: Write a multi-touch follow-up cadence that converts
items.description: Creates a 5-7 email follow-up sequence with varied hooks, value adds, and breakup email.

items.name: Win/Loss Analysis
items.tagline: Extract insights from won and lost deals
items.description: Structures post-deal analysis to surface patterns in wins and losses for sales improvement.

items.name: Incident Postmortem
items.tagline: Write blameless postmortems for production incidents
items.description: Creates structured blameless postmortem documents with timeline, impact, root cause, and action items.

items.name: Runbook Writer
items.tagline: Create step-by-step operational runbooks
items.description: Produces clear, actionable runbooks for operational procedures, deployments, and incident response.

items.name: Architecture Decision Record
items.tagline: Document architectural decisions with context and consequences
items.description: Creates an ADR documenting the context, decision, alternatives considered, and consequences.

items.name: Deployment Checklist
items.tagline: Generate pre/post deployment checklists for safe releases
items.description: Creates comprehensive deployment checklists tailored to the service and deployment type.

items.name: On-Call Alert Triage
items.tagline: Classify and prioritize production alerts
items.description: Structures the investigation and classification of production alerts for on-call engineers.
